name: ethGetPhyState
title: ethGetPhyState
syntax: long ethGetPhyState(long channel, long hwChannel ); // form 2

parameters.name: hwChannel
parameters.description: Hardware channel number. Vector network interface must support more than 1 hardware channel to use.Value range: 1..16

parameters.name: port
parameters.description: Ethernet port. Only supported for network-based configurations and physical measurement ports.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
